title: Finn and the Safari Friends
synopsis: Little Finn explores the African savanna and meets friendly animals including elephants, lions, zebras, and giraffes in this gentle introduction to safari wildlife.

pages.text: Finn walks in the warm savanna. The grass is golden and tall.

illustration.description: A small boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes walking through golden grassland in gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Big elephant says hello! Trumpet, trumpet! Finn waves back.

illustration.description: A friendly gray elephant with expressive eyes painted in textured painterly gouache style, with a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving, warm orange sunset colors and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn waving at a friendly elephant

pages.text: Sleepy lion rests under a tree. Finn tiptoes quietly past.

illustration.description: A golden lion resting under an acacia tree in gouache painting with thick brushstrokes, while a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes tiptoes by in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Finn tiptoeing past a sleeping lion

pages.text: Zebra family runs and plays. Black and white stripes everywhere!

illustration.description: Three zebras with bold black and white stripes galloping through golden grass in textured painterly gouache style, with a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes watching, painted with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Finn watching zebras run and play

pages.text: Tall giraffe reaches high leaves. His neck stretches up, up, up!

illustration.description: A very tall giraffe with spotted pattern reaching for acacia leaves painted in warm savanna colors with thick brushstrokes, while a boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes looks up in wonder, orange sunset background
illustration.alt: Finn looking up at a tall giraffe eating leaves

pages.text: The sun sets orange and red. Finn says goodbye to all his new animal friends.

illustration.description: A boy with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes waving goodbye to elephant, lion, zebras and giraffe silhouetted against a vibrant orange sunset painted in gouache with bold confident strokes and warm colors
illustration.alt: Finn waving goodbye to safari animals at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the elephant make?
questions.explanation: Elephants make trumpet sounds with their trunks!

questions.question: What colors are the zebra's stripes?
questions.explanation: Zebras have beautiful black and white stripes!

questions.question: What does the giraffe eat?
questions.explanation: Giraffes use their long necks to reach leaves high up in trees!
